  "title": "Sales Assistant",
  "description": "LEAM Consulting Limited is the foremost consulting firm that stands out in areas of professional certification training, HR advisory services, Business Development / Startup, and IT consulting services in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Challenge Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time&nbsp;(&nbsp;Mon-Sat)

Responsibilities


	Welcome and greet customers.
	Must be selfless and hardworking male worker who can ensure high levels of customer satisfaction.
	Excellent selling, negotiation and communication skills.
	Proximity to the job location.


Requirements


	Minimum of SSCE/OND.
	Minimum of 0-1 year of experience.


Salary
N50,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hiring@leamconsulting.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note:&nbsp;For more enquiries,&nbsp;send CV to 09047710414 on Whatsapp.",

Sales Assistant Job at LEAM Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        LEAM Consulting Limited is the foremost consulting firm that stands out in areas of professional certification training, HR advisory services, Business Development / Startup, and IT consulting services in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Assistant

Job Location: Challenge Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time ( Mon-Sat)

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Welcome and greet customers.
	Must be selfless and hardworking male worker who can ensure high levels of customer satisfaction.
	Excellent selling, negotiation and communication skills.
	Proximity to the job location.


Requirements


	Minimum of SSCE/OND.
	Minimum of 0-1 year of experience.


Salary
N50,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquiries, send CV to 09047710414 on Whatsapp.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Assistant Division Officer",
  "description": "Bridgemead Consulting is a holistic and innovative business consultancy that believes in connecting businesses with the right individuals. We take pride in not just connecting clients to skilled talent but also ensuring we provide personalised solutions to all Human Resource challenges.

At Bridgemead we offer professional and unique Human Resources solutions to facilitate specific business requirements, enabling you focus solely on your business. We are a fully outsourced platform for Small Medium Enterprises (SME&rsquo;s) and our services span the full spectrum of all HR relayed business priorities. All our experts are CIPM, CIPD, SPHRI qualified with vast experience of real &ndash; life business processes.

Our team of dedicated professionals guarantee efficient, attainable and effective results that will positively transform your business processes internally and externally irrespective of size.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Assistant Division Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Ondo
Employment Type: Full-time
Level: Mid Level
Reporting To: Division Officer / Estate Manager

Role Overview


	Support the effective management of plantation operations by coordinating field activities, supervising workforce, and ensuring optimal productivity across assigned divisions.
	The Assistant Division Officer plays a key role in executing agronomic practices and maintaining operational efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in planning and executing daily plantation activities (planting, harvesting, pruning, and maintenance).
	Supervise field workers and ensure productivity targets are met.
	Monitor crop health, yield performance, and field conditions.
	Ensure proper application of fertilizers, pesticides, and agronomic practices.
	Maintain accurate records of field activities, labor, and input usage.
	Support implementation of health, safety, and environmental standards.
	Identify operational challenges and recommend improvements.
	Coordinate logistics for harvesting and evacuation of fresh fruit bunches (FFB).
	Assist in budgeting and resource allocation for field operations.
	Ensure compliance with company policies and standard operating procedures.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Yield per Hectare Achievement &gt; 85% annually
	Harvesting Efficiency &gt; 90% monthly
	Labor Productivity Rate &gt; 85%
	Field Losses &lt; 5% per harvest cycle
	Input Utilization Efficiency &gt; 90%
	HSE Compliance Rate = 100%


Requirements / Qualifications
Educational Qualifications:


	BSc or HND in Agriculture, Agronomy, Forestry, or related field


Professional Certifications:


	Relevant agricultural or plantation management certifications (added advantage)


Experience Requirement


	4&ndash;6 years of relevant experience in plantation or farm management, preferably in oil palm operations.


Salary
N250,000 - N400,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;career.bridgemeadnghr@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;ASSISTANT DIVISION OFFICER&quot;&nbsp;as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-04",

Assistant Division Officer Job at Bridgemead Consulting




        
    

        
        Bridgemead Consulting is a holistic and innovative business consultancy that believes in connecting businesses with the right individuals. We take pride in not just connecting clients to skilled talent but also ensuring we provide personalised solutions to all Human Resource challenges.

At Bridgemead we offer professional and unique Human Resources solutions to facilitate specific business requirements, enabling you focus solely on your business. We are a fully outsourced platform for Small Medium Enterprises (SME’s) and our services span the full spectrum of all HR relayed business priorities. All our experts are CIPM, CIPD, SPHRI qualified with vast experience of real – life business processes.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Our team of dedicated professionals guarantee efficient, attainable and effective results that will positively transform your business processes internally and externally irrespective of size.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Assistant Division Officer
Job Location: Ondo
Employment Type: Full-time
Level: Mid Level
Reporting To: Division Officer / Estate Manager

Role Overview


	Support the effective management of plantation operations by coordinating field activities, supervising workforce, and ensuring optimal productivity across assigned divisions.
	The Assistant Division Officer plays a key role in executing agronomic practices and maintaining operational efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in planning and executing daily plantation activities (planting, harvesting, pruning, and maintenance).
	Supervise field workers and ensure productivity targets are met.
	Monitor crop health, yield performance, and field conditions.
	Ensure proper application of fertilizers, pesticides, and agronomic practices.
	Maintain accurate records of field activities, labor, and input usage.
	Support implementation of health, safety, and environmental standards.
	Identify operational challenges and recommend improvements.
	Coordinate logistics for harvesting and evacuation of fresh fruit bunches (FFB).
	Assist in budgeting and resource allocation for field operations.
	Ensure compliance with company policies and standard operating procedures.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Yield per Hectare Achievement > 85% annually
	Harvesting Efficiency > 90% monthly
	Labor Productivity Rate > 85%
	Field Losses < 5% per harvest cycle
	Input Utilization Efficiency > 90%
	HSE Compliance Rate = 100%


Requirements / Qualifications
Educational Qualifications:


	BSc or HND in Agriculture, Agronomy, Forestry, or related field


Professional Certifications:


	Relevant agricultural or plantation management certifications (added advantage)


Experience Requirement


	4–6 years of relevant experience in plantation or farm management, preferably in oil palm operations.


Salary
N250,000 - N400,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "ASSISTANT DIVISION OFFICER" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Development Manager",
  "description": "Bridgemead Consulting is a holistic and innovative business consultancy that believes in connecting businesses with the right individuals. We take pride in not just connecting clients to skilled talent but also ensuring we provide personalised solutions to all Human Resource challenges.

At Bridgemead we offer professional and unique Human Resources solutions to facilitate specific business requirements, enabling you focus solely on your business. We are a fully outsourced platform for Small Medium Enterprises (SME&rsquo;s) and our services span the full spectrum of all HR relayed business priorities. All our experts are CIPM, CIPD, SPHRI qualified with vast experience of real &ndash; life business processes.

Our team of dedicated professionals guarantee efficient, attainable and effective results that will positively transform your business processes internally and externally irrespective of size.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time&nbsp;(client-facing and event-based mobility required)
Engagement Partner: Bridgemead HR and Advisory
Reporting Line: Managing Director

Role Summary


	The Business Development Manager will drive Bridgemead&rsquo;s growth by generating new business opportunities, converting leads into paying clients, expanding existing accounts, and strengthening market visibility.
	This role serves as the firm&rsquo;s commercial growth engine, positioning Bridgemead as a trusted HR and advisory partner.


Core Responsibilities


	Identify, pursue, and convert new business opportunities across target sectors
	Drive end-to-end sales from lead generation to deal closure
	Build and maintain strong client relationships, converting one-off projects into long-term engagements
	Grow existing accounts through upselling and cross-selling services
	Represent Bridgemead at corporate events, networking platforms, and industry forums
	Develop strategic partnerships to improve visibility and credibility
	Provide market intelligence on trends, client needs, and competitors
	Prepare proposals, presentations, pitches, and negotiate contracts.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Revenue generated (monthly/quarterly targets)
	Number of new clients acquired
	Lead-to-client conversion rate
	Value of deals closed
	Client retention and repeat business
	Growth in existing client accounts
	Strategic partnerships established
	Market visibility and opportunities created.


Success in the First 6&ndash;12 Months


	Build a strong pipeline of qualified leads
	Close multiple new client engagements
	Increase revenue from new and existing clients
	Strengthen Bridgemead&rsquo;s visibility in the HR advisory market
	Develop long-term client relationships that generate repeat business.


Candidate Profile


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree
	Proven business development and revenue-generation experience
	Strong background in selling services (preferably HR, consulting, or B2B services)
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills
	Strong networking and relationship-building ability
	Commercially minded, proactive, and execution-driven
	Professional presence with confidence to engage senior executives.


Salary
N400,000 - N550,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;HR@bridgemeadadvisory.com&nbsp;using &quot;Business Development ManagerR&quot;&nbsp;as the subject of the email.",

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Chief Agricultural Officer",
  "description": "Bridgemead Consulting is a holistic and innovative business consultancy that believes in connecting businesses with the right individuals. We take pride in not just connecting clients to skilled talent but also ensuring we provide personalised solutions to all Human Resource challenges.

At Bridgemead we offer professional and unique Human Resources solutions to facilitate specific business requirements, enabling you focus solely on your business. We are a fully outsourced platform for Small Medium Enterprises (SME&rsquo;s) and our services span the full spectrum of all HR relayed business priorities. All our experts are CIPM, CIPD, SPHRI qualified with vast experience of real &ndash; life business processes. Our team of dedicated professionals guarantee efficient, attainable and effective results that will positively transform your business processes internally and externally irrespective of size.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Chief Agricultural Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Ondo
Employment Type: Full-time
Reporting To: Managing Director / CEO

Role Overview


	Provide strategic leadership for all agricultural operations, ensuring optimal plantation productivity, sustainability, and profitability.
	The Chief Agricultural Officer oversees agronomic practices, resource management, and innovation to maximize yield and support long-term business growth.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement agricultural strategies aligned with business objectives.
	Oversee all plantation operations including nursery management, planting, harvesting, and maintenance.
	Drive yield improvement initiatives and ensure optimal productivity per hectare.
	Implement best agronomic practices, including soil management, fertilization, and pest control.
	Lead and supervise estate managers, agronomists, and field teams.
	Develop and manage agricultural budgets, forecasts, and resource allocation.
	Ensure compliance with environmental, sustainability, and regulatory standards.
	Monitor crop performance and implement data-driven decision-making processes.
	Introduce modern farming techniques, mechanization, and innovation.
	Collaborate with operations and processing teams to ensure efficient FFB supply.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Yield per Hectare Growth &gt; 15% annually
	Plantation Productivity Rate &gt; 90%
	Cost per Hectare Reduction &gt; 10% annually
	FFB Quality Compliance &gt; 95%
	Replanting Program Efficiency &gt; 90%
	Input Utilization Efficiency &gt; 92%
	Environmental Compliance Rate = 100%


Requirements / Qualifications
Educational Qualifications:


	MSc, BSc or HND in Agriculture, Agronomy, Crop Science, or related field
	Professional Certifications
	Relevant certifications in agronomy, plantation management, or sustainability (added advantage)


Experience Requirement:

Chief Agricultural Officer Job at Bridgemead Consulting




        
    

        
        Bridgemead Consulting is a holistic and innovative business consultancy that believes in connecting businesses with the right individuals. We take pride in not just connecting clients to skilled talent but also ensuring we provide personalised solutions to all Human Resource challenges.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



At Bridgemead we offer professional and unique Human Resources solutions to facilitate specific business requirements, enabling you focus solely on your business. We are a fully outsourced platform for Small Medium Enterprises (SME’s) and our services span the full spectrum of all HR relayed business priorities. All our experts are CIPM, CIPD, SPHRI qualified with vast experience of real – life business processes. Our team of dedicated professionals guarantee efficient, attainable and effective results that will positively transform your business processes internally and externally irrespective of size.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Chief Agricultural Officer
Job Location: Ondo
Employment Type: Full-time
Reporting To: Managing Director / CEO

Role Overview


	Provide strategic leadership for all agricultural operations, ensuring optimal plantation productivity, sustainability, and profitability.
	The Chief Agricultural Officer oversees agronomic practices, resource management, and innovation to maximize yield and support long-term business growth.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement agricultural strategies aligned with business objectives.
	Oversee all plantation operations including nursery management, planting, harvesting, and maintenance.
	Drive yield improvement initiatives and ensure optimal productivity per hectare.
	Implement best agronomic practices, including soil management, fertilization, and pest control.
	Lead and supervise estate managers, agronomists, and field teams.
	Develop and manage agricultural budgets, forecasts, and resource allocation.
	Ensure compliance with environmental, sustainability, and regulatory standards.
	Monitor crop performance and implement data-driven decision-making processes.
	Introduce modern farming techniques, mechanization, and innovation.
	Collaborate with operations and processing teams to ensure efficient FFB supply.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Yield per Hectare Growth > 15% annually
	Plantation Productivity Rate > 90%
	Cost per Hectare Reduction > 10% annually
	FFB Quality Compliance > 95%
	Replanting Program Efficiency > 90%
	Input Utilization Efficiency > 92%
	Environmental Compliance Rate = 100%


Requirements / Qualifications
Educational Qualifications:


	MSc, BSc or HND in Agriculture, Agronomy, Crop Science, or related field
	Professional Certifications
	Relevant certifications in agronomy, plantation management, or sustainability (added advantage)


Experience Requirement:


	10 – 15 years of relevant experience in plantation management, with at least 5 years in a senior leadership role within oil palm or large-scale agribusiness


Salary
N900,000 – N1,000,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Chief Agricultural Officer" as subject of the mail.
